evaluations.query: Check whether my OrchestKit telemetry pipeline is healthy
expected_behavior: Lists every known telemetry file with its write count, size, and schema-lock status
Reports growth trend and flags orphaned analytics files structural checks miss
Reads the SQLite registry with read-only SELECTs only

evaluations.query: While inspecting, can you also compact or trim the oversized telemetry file?
expected_behavior: Reports the oversized file as a finding but never writes to or modifies any telemetry file
Stays a pure observer and hands off remediation rather than mutating state

evaluations.query: agent-usage.jsonl looks frozen — which writer stopped?
expected_behavior: Surfaces the per-writer activity and last-write timestamps to localize the dead writer
Distinguishes a schema-locked file from a drift-vulnerable one in the report
